title: Providing amounts for the expenses of the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology in the One Hundred Nineteenth Congress.
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
subjects: House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology
crs_summary: This resolution provides amounts for the expenses of the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology for the 119th Congress.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on House Administration.
